name: Rogue
description: A stealthy skirmisher built around burst damage and utility. Rogues open with a devastating backstab, envenom their blades, sneak past danger and are the only class able to pick locked chests and doors; at level 15 they learn eviscerate, a rupturing finisher that leaves a foe bleeding out, and at level 30 ambush, an opening strike from stealth that hits like a hammer and leaves the victim dazed, then at level 45 a smoke bomb, an escape tool that veils them in choking smoke to slip blows and strike from concealment, then at level 60 garrote, a choking wire that silences a foe's cries and throttles their attacks — the rogue's first true control tool, and at level 75 blade flurry, the rogue's first area attack: a whirling flurry of blades that flashes across every foe in the room at once, then at level 85 a kidney shot, the rogue's first hard stun: a brutal blow that drops a single foe helpless and reeling, unable to act.
